{{公園 | 名称 = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | 英語名称 = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | 画像 = [[ファイル:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 |画像キャプション= {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | 国 = {{JPN}} | 都市 = [[大阪府]][[南河内郡]][[河南町]] | 緯度度 = 34 |緯度分 = 30 |緯度秒 = 11.2 | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 38 |経度秒 = 37.6 | 分類 = [[史跡]]公園（[[風土記の丘]]） | 面積 = 29ha | 前身 = | 開園 = [[1986年]]（昭和61年）6月 | 運営者 = 大阪府 | 年来園者数 = | 現況 = 年中開放 | 設備・遊具 = | 駐車場 = あり30台（他に博物館80台） | バリアフリー = | 建築家と技術者 = | 告示 = | 事務所 = [[大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館]]
（園内には別途管理棟あり） | 事務所所在地 = 大阪府南河内郡河南町大字東山299番地 | 電話番号 = 0721-93-8321 | 備考 = | 公式サイト = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　近つ飛鳥風土記の丘（大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館ホームページ）] }} '''大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘'''（おおさかふりつちかつあすかふどきのおか）は、[[大阪府]][[南河内郡]][[河南町]]にある[[大阪府]]立の[[歴史公園]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　公共施設のご案内 - 大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館（近つ飛鳥風土紀の丘）]大阪府庁ホームページ（[[風土記の丘]]）。国の指定[[史跡]]である[[一須賀古墳群]]が保存されている。 == 概要 == 昭和40年代（1965年～1974年）に[[大阪府]][[南河内郡]][[河南町]]ほかの丘陵地にある一須賀古墳群が[[大和団地]]開発の[[日本のニュータウン|ニュータウン]]、阪南[[ネオポリス]]造成によって失われようとしていたところを、大阪府が古墳の最も密集している区域29ヘクタールを開発会社より買収したうえで保存を図ったもの。古墳群の中に園路を設けるなどの整備をし、[[1986年]]（昭和61年）6月に一般開放した。[[1994年]]（平成6年）[[10月7日]]に、国により[[史跡]]として指定を受けている。 なおこの施設は文化財の一般公開を目的とした史跡公園であり、[[都市公園]]ではない[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　河南町都市計画マスタープラン（令和3年3月）]P23。 == 施設・設備 == * [[一須賀古墳群]] **直径15m前後の円墳（一部方墳）102基 - うち40基が横穴式石室で、内部見学も可能。 * [[大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館]] - 古墳群からの出土品を展示紹介。1994年（平成6年）に開館。 * 展望台2箇所 - 「近つ飛鳥」一帯や[[文化遺産 (世界遺産)|世界文化遺産]][[古市古墳群]]、遠くには大阪市内や六甲の山並み、[[淡路島]]などが望める{{Cite web|url=https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html|title=近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|website=河南町|accessdate= 2022-10-02}}。 * 緑の広場 * 桜並木 * 梅林 - 博物館の裏に約140本の梅林 * 休憩所 * トイレ2箇所 * 無料駐車場（30台） [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　近つ飛鳥風土記の丘案内図] == 利用案内 == *開園：09:30 *閉園：17:00 == 交通アクセス == *[[近鉄長野線]] [[富田林駅]]または[[喜志駅]]から[[金剛自動車|金剛バス]]石川線（富田林駅）、阪南線（喜志駅）「近つ飛鳥博物館前行き」に乗車し、終点「近つ飛鳥博物館前」バス停下車すぐ。 *[[南阪奈道路]] [[羽曳野東インターチェンジ|羽曳野東IC]]あるいは[[太子インターチェンジ|太子IC]]から約10分。 [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　近つ飛鳥博物館の概要（交通アクセスなど詳細記載あり）]大阪府ホームページ == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} ==参考文献== *{{Cite book|和書|author=続河南町誌編纂委員会|title=続河南町誌|publisher=[[河南町]]|year=2004|date=2004-09|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|和書|author=大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|title=大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館館報|issue=10|publisher=[[大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == 関連項目 == *[[大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館]] *[[一須賀古墳群]] *[[河南町]] *[[風土記の丘]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　近つ飛鳥風土記の丘] – 大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館ホームページ * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html 近つ飛鳥風土記の丘] – OSAKA INFO（大阪観光情報） * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　近つ飛鳥風土記の丘] - 河南町ホームページ {{Pref-stub|pref=大阪府}} {{デフォルトソート:おおさかふりつちかつあすかふときのおか}} [[Category:大阪府の公園]] [[Category:大阪府にある国指定の史跡]] [[Category:河南町の歴史]] [[Category:1986年開業の施設]]

{{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|ja|南河内郡}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府}} | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館}}
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|ja|南河内郡}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府}}[http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群}}, a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群}}, located in the hills of {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町}} and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|ja|古市古墳群}}, designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|ja|淡路島}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町}} * {{ill|Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|ja|南河内郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|12=draft}} | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=draft}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|12=draft}}
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|ja|南河内郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|12=draft}}[http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|12=draft}}, a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|12=draft}}, located in the hills of {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|12=draft}} and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=draft}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=draft}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|12=draft}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|12=draft}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|ja|古市古墳群|12=draft}}, designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|ja|淡路島|12=draft}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=draft}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=draft}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=draft}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|12=draft}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|12=draft}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|12=draft}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|12=draft}} * {{ill|Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=draft}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Parks in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan]] [[Category:History of Kanan, Osaka]] [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Fudoki Hills]] }} [[sn:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] [[en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]]

On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|ja|古市古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furuichi Kofun Cluster|qq=}}, designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|ja|淡路島|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awaji Island|qq=}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}} * {{ill|Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Parks in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan]] [[Category:History of Kanan, Osaka]] [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Fudoki Hills]] }} [[sn:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] [[en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|ja|南河内郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamikawachi District, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefecture|qq=}} | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}}
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|ja|南河内郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamikawachi District, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefecture|qq=}}[http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}}, a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}}, located in the hills of {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}} and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|qq=}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|qq=}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|ja|古市古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furuichi Kofun Cluster|qq=}}, designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|ja|淡路島|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awaji Island|qq=}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}} * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Parks in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan]] [[Category:History of Kanan, Osaka]] [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Fudoki Hills]] }} [[sn:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] [[en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]]

(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|ja|南河内郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamikawachi District, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefecture|qq=}}[http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|ja|古市古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furuichi Kofun Cluster|qq=}}, designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|ja|淡路島|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awaji Island|qq=}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥博物館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|qq=}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|ja|一須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|ja|河南町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanan, Osaka|qq=}} * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - revision.text:
{{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|qq=}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|qq=}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - revision.text:
{{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|qq=}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|qq=}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Parks in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan]] [[Category:History of Kanan, Osaka]] [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Fudoki Hills]] }} [[sn:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] [[en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[Category:1986年開業の施設]] [[Category:大阪府にある国指定の史跡]]

[http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - revision.comment: Bot: replace redirect category → National historic sites in Osaka prefecture
revision.text:
{{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|qq=}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|qq=}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|qq=}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|qq=}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Parks in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan]] [[Category:History of Kanan, Osaka]] [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Fudoki Hills]] }} [[sn:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] [[Category:1986年開業の施設]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Parks and gardens in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:河南町の歴史]] {{Commons category|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka}}

[http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - revision.text:
{{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|qq=}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|qq=}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|qq=}} Ishikawa Line (from [[Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|qq=}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|qq=}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Parks in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan]] [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] }} [[sn:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu-Asuka Fudoki Hill]] [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] [[Category:1986年開業の施設]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Parks and gardens in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:河南町の歴史]] {{Commons category|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka}}
