[[sn:commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17239440]] Wikidata name: Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Historical Park [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[:en:World Heritage Site|World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from [[:en:Tondabayashi Station|Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[:en:Kishi Station|Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[:en:Minami-Hanna Road|Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - [[sn:commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17239440]] Wikidata name: Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Historical Park [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[:en:World Heritage Site|World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from [[:en:Tondabayashi Station|Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[:en:Kishi Station|Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[:en:Minami-Hanna Road|Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[:en:World Heritage Site|World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from [[:en:Tondabayashi Station|Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[:en:Kishi Station|Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[:en:Minami-Hanna Road|Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] }} [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] [[Category:Facilities Opened in 1986]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Parks and gardens in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kanan]] {{Commons category|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka}} {{wikidata link|Q17239440}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[sn:commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17239440]] Wikidata name: Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Historical Park [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[:en:World Heritage Site|World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from [[:en:Tondabayashi Station|Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[:en:Kishi Station|Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[:en:Minami-Hanna Road|Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[sn:commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17239440]] Wikidata name: Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Historical Park [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[:en:World Heritage Site|World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from [[:en:Tondabayashi Station|Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[:en:Kishi Station|Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[:en:Minami-Hanna Road|Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] {{Commons category|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka}} {{wikidata link|Q17239440}} [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Facilities Opened in 1986]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kanan]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Parks and gardens in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[sn:commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17239440]] Wikidata name: Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Historical Park [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]][http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], a nationally designated [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]]. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]], located in the hills of [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June [[:en:1986|1986]] (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site]] by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the [[:en:Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi Kofun Cluster]], designated as a [[:en:World Heritage Site|World Heritage Site]], as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and [[:en:Awaji Island|Awaji Island]][https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from [[:en:Tondabayashi Station|Tondabayashi Station]]) or Hannan Line (from [[:en:Kishi Station|Kishi Station]]), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from [[:en:Minami-Hanna Road|Minami-Hanna Road]] {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher=[[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]]|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher=[[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]]|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * [[:en:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum]] * [[:en:Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster]] * [[:en:Kanan, Osaka|Kanan, Osaka]] * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - (separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|en|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|WD=Q1347323|lt=Minamikawachi District, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}}, a nationally designated {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}}. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}}, located in the hills of {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}} and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June {{ill|1986|en|1986|WD=Q2430|lt=1986}} (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}} by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a {{ill|Urban park|en|Urban park|WD=Q22746|lt=Urban park}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|en|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|WD=Q4250076|lt=Furuichi Kofun Cluster}}, designated as a {{ill|World Heritage Site|en|World Heritage Site|WD=Q9259|lt=World Heritage Site}}, as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|en|Awaji Island|WD=Q504373|lt=Awaji Island}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from {{ill|Tondabayashi Station|en|Tondabayashi Station|WD=Q7820789|lt=Tondabayashi Station}}) or Hannan Line (from {{ill|Kishi Station|en|Kishi Station|WD=Q6416574|lt=Kishi Station}}), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|Minami-Hanna Road|en|Minami-Hanna Road|WD=Q6862872|lt=Minami-Hanna Road}} {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}} * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] {{Commons category|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka}} {{wikidata link|Q17239440}} [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Facilities Opened in 1986]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kanan]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Parks and gardens in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

The park preserves the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}}, a nationally designated {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}}. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}}, located in the hills of {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}} and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June {{ill|1986|en|1986|WD=Q2430|lt=1986}} (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}} by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a {{ill|Urban park|en|Urban park|WD=Q22746|lt=Urban park}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|en|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|WD=Q4250076|lt=Furuichi Kofun Cluster}}, designated as a {{ill|World Heritage Site|en|World Heritage Site|WD=Q9259|lt=World Heritage Site}}, as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|en|Awaji Island|WD=Q504373|lt=Awaji Island}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from {{ill|Tondabayashi Station|en|Tondabayashi Station|WD=Q7820789|lt=Tondabayashi Station}}) or Hannan Line (from {{ill|Kishi Station|en|Kishi Station|WD=Q6416574|lt=Kishi Station}}), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|Minami-Hanna Road|en|Minami-Hanna Road|WD=Q6862872|lt=Minami-Hanna Road}} {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}} * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June {{ill|1986|en|1986|WD=Q2430|lt=1986}} (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}} by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a {{ill|Urban park|en|Urban park|WD=Q22746|lt=Urban park}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|en|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|WD=Q4250076|lt=Furuichi Kofun Cluster}}, designated as a {{ill|World Heritage Site|en|World Heritage Site|WD=Q9259|lt=World Heritage Site}}, as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|en|Awaji Island|WD=Q504373|lt=Awaji Island}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from {{ill|Tondabayashi Station|en|Tondabayashi Station|WD=Q7820789|lt=Tondabayashi Station}}) or Hannan Line (from {{ill|Kishi Station|en|Kishi Station|WD=Q6416574|lt=Kishi Station}}), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|Minami-Hanna Road|en|Minami-Hanna Road|WD=Q6862872|lt=Minami-Hanna Road}} {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}} * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] {{Commons category|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka}} {{wikidata link|Q17239440}} [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Facilities Opened in 1986]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kanan]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Parks and gardens in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

revision.text:
[[co:commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[co:commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[sn:commons:Category:Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka]][[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] {{Infobox park | name = Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka | native_name = 大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 | english_name = Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka
Historical Park | image = [[File:近つ飛鳥風土記の丘 緑の広場 2013.3.30 - panoramio.jpg|300px]]　 | image_caption = {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=300|coord={{coord|34|30|11.2|N|135|38|37.6|E}}}} | country = {{JPN}} | location = {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|en|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|WD=Q1347323|lt=Minamikawachi District, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}} | latitude_deg = 34 |latitude_min = 30 |latitude_sec = 11.2 | longitude_deg = 135 |longitude_min = 38 |longitude_sec = 37.6 | type = {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}} park ({{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}}) | area = 29 ha | opened = {{ill|1986|en|1986|WD=Q2430|lt=1986}} (Shōwa 61), June | operator = Osaka Prefecture | status = Open year-round | parking = Available, 30 spaces (plus 80 spaces at the museum) | office = {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}}
(separate management building within the park) | office_address = 299 Higashiyama, Kanan, Minamikawachi District, Osaka Prefecture | phone = 0721-93-8321 | website = [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka (Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Official Website)] }} '''Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka''' (大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘) is a [[historic park]] located in {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|en|Minamikawachi District, Osaka|WD=Q1347323|lt=Minamikawachi District, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/annai/shisetsu/detail.php?recid=39　Public Facility Guide - Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum (Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka)] Osaka Prefectural Government Website. The park preserves the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}}, a nationally designated {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}}. == Overview == During the 1965–1974 period (Shōwa 40s), the {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}}, located in the hills of {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}} and surrounding areas, was at risk of destruction due to the development of the {{ill|Yamato Danchi|ja|大和団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Danchi|1=Yamato Danchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11433426}} [[New Towns in Japan|new town]] project and the construction of the {{ill|Hannan Neopolis|ja|阪南ネオポリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hannan Neopolis|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In response, Osaka Prefecture purchased a 29-hectare section containing the densest concentration of Kofuns from the development company to preserve them. The area was developed with pathways integrated into the kofun cluster and opened to the public in June {{ill|1986|en|1986|WD=Q2430|lt=1986}} (Shōwa 61). On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}} by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a {{ill|Urban park|en|Urban park|WD=Q22746|lt=Urban park}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|en|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|WD=Q4250076|lt=Furuichi Kofun Cluster}}, designated as a {{ill|World Heritage Site|en|World Heritage Site|WD=Q9259|lt=World Heritage Site}}, as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|en|Awaji Island|WD=Q504373|lt=Awaji Island}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from {{ill|Tondabayashi Station|en|Tondabayashi Station|WD=Q7820789|lt=Tondabayashi Station}}) or Hannan Line (from {{ill|Kishi Station|en|Kishi Station|WD=Q6416574|lt=Kishi Station}}), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|Minami-Hanna Road|en|Minami-Hanna Road|WD=Q6862872|lt=Minami-Hanna Road}} {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}} * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] {{Commons category|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka}} {{wikidata link|Q17239440}} [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Facilities Opened in 1986]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kanan]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Parks and gardens in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

On [[October 7, 1994]] (Heisei 6), the park was designated a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site}} by the national government. This facility is a historic site park intended for cultural heritage preservation and public education, rather than a {{ill|Urban park|en|Urban park|WD=Q22746|lt=Urban park}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/material/files/group/15/R3toshikeikakumasterplan.pdf　Kanan Town Urban Planning Master Plan (March 2021)] p.23. == Facilities == * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} ** 102 round Kofuns, approximately 15 meters in diameter (some square-shaped). ** 40 of the tombs have {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chambers) accessible for public viewing. * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} – Exhibits artifacts excavated from the kofun cluster. Opened in 1994 (Heisei 6). * Two observation decks – Offering views of the "Chikatsu Asuka" region, the {{ill|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|en|Furuichi Kofun Cluster|WD=Q4250076|lt=Furuichi Kofun Cluster}}, designated as a {{ill|World Heritage Site|en|World Heritage Site|WD=Q9259|lt=World Heritage Site}}, as well as distant views of [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], the Rokko mountain range, and {{ill|Awaji Island|en|Awaji Island|WD=Q504373|lt=Awaji Island}}[https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] Kanan Town Homepage, accessed October 2, 2022. * Green Plaza * Cherry Blossom Trees * Plum Grove – Approximately 140 plum trees behind the museum. * Rest Areas * Two Public Toilets * Free Parking (30 spaces) [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/static/pdf/fudoki/fuudoki_map.pdf　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka Map] == Visitor Information == * Opening time: 09:30 * Closing time: 17:00 == Transportation Access == * From [[:en:Kintetsu Nagano Line|Kintetsu Nagano Line]], take the {{ill|Kongō Bus|ja|金剛自動車|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kongō Bus|1=Kongo Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11646543}} Ishikawa Line (from {{ill|Tondabayashi Station|en|Tondabayashi Station|WD=Q7820789|lt=Tondabayashi Station}}) or Hannan Line (from {{ill|Kishi Station|en|Kishi Station|WD=Q6416574|lt=Kishi Station}}), and alight at "Chikatsu Asuka Museum-mae" bus stop. * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|Minami-Hanna Road|en|Minami-Hanna Road|WD=Q6862872|lt=Minami-Hanna Road}} {{ill|Habikino-Higashi Interchange|ja|羽曳野東インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Habikino-Higashi Interchange|1=Habikino-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11610186}} or {{ill|Taishi Interchange|ja|太子インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi Interchange|1=Taishi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443861}}. [http://www.pref.osaka.lg.jp/bunkazaihogo/jouhou/tikatsu.html　Overview of Chikatsu Asuka Museum (including detailed transportation information)] Osaka Prefecture Website. == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == *{{Cite book|ja|author=Zoku Kanan Town History Compilation Committee|title=Zoku Kanan Town History|publisher={{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}}|year=2004|date=September 2004|ref=harv}} *{{Cite journal|ja|author=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|title=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Bulletin|issue=10|publisher={{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}}|year=2006|date=2006|ref=harv}} == See Also == * {{ill|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|en|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum|WD=Q4557237|lt=Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum}} * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|WD=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} * {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|WD=Q2305508|lt=Kanan, Osaka}} * {{ill|Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki Hill|lt=Fudoki no Oka|ja|風土記の丘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudoki no Oka|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.chikatsu-asuka.jp/?s=fudoki　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Museum Homepage * [http://www.osaka-info.jp/jp/search/detail/sightseeing_273.html Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] – OSAKA INFO (Osaka Tourism Information) * [https://www.town.kanan.osaka.jp/kanko_bunka_sports/rekishi_bunka/2/3037.html　Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-No-Oka] - Kanan Town Homepage {{Pref-stub|pref=Osaka}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘|version=104328906|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:大阪府立近つ飛鳥風土記の丘]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%98%AA%E5%BA%9C%E7%AB%8B%E8%BF%91%E3%81%A4%E9%A3%9B%E9%B3%A5%E9%A2%A8%E5%9C%9F%E8%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%98]] {{Commons category|Osaka Prefectural Chikatsu Asuka Fudoki-no-oka}} {{wikidata link|Q17239440}} [[Category:1986 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Facilities Opened in 1986]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kanan]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Parks and gardens in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]
